creator: neldredge@math.ucsd.edu
text:
Hi Ven,

This might be related to 
http://security.freebsd.org/advisories/FreeBSD-SA-08:07.amd64.asc .  I 
originally discovered the bug when running Java (a Linux binary in that 
case) caused the machine to reboot.  Could you please apply the patch 
http://security.FreeBSD.org/patches/SA-08:07/amd64.patch , or else upgrade 
to FreeBSD 6.3-RELEASE-p6 or 6.4-RELEASE, and see if the problem still 
appears?

-- 

Nate Eldredge
neldredge@math.ucsd.edu
